description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.7-alpine Docker image with a postgres:alpine service and set the PIP_CACHE_DIR variable to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache/pip. Define a single job called tests that runs in the default test stage. In its before_script execute: python -V; apk --update add --no-cache build-base gcc libgcc libffi-dev openssl-dev git postgresql-client jpeg-dev openjpeg-dev zlib-dev freetype-dev lcms2-dev freetype-dev gifsicle musl-dev python3-dev; pip3 install pipenv wheel; pipenv install --dev; cp config/config.ci.yml config/config.yml; psql -h postgres -U postgres -f schema.sql; pipenv run ./manage.py genkeys; pipenv run ./manage.py setup_tests. Then run the script steps: pipenv run pyflakes magma; pipenv run pyflakes tests; pipenv run pyflakes run.py; pipenv run pytest tests. No artifacts, caches, or special rules are defined.
